evidence_summary: Establish the lethal fragility of the porcelain environment by staging a physical mishap that results in permanent structural damage to characters. The sequence must transition from cautious navigation to sudden chaos and conclude with the heavy emotional w...

While navigating the landscape, Dorothy startles a china cow. The resulting chaos causes the cow to kick over a China Milkmaid; the cow breaks its leg and the milkmaid is nicked on the elbow, highlighting the permanent consequences of breakage in this world.
The group navigates the smooth white platter-like floor of the dainty_china_country with extreme caution.
The group stands in shock amidst the broken porcelain limbs and chipped surfaces.
Dorothy startles the cow, causing a kick that breaks the cow's leg and nicks the milkmaid.
